examples: "Good morning, Pinocchio," said the Fox, greeting him courteously.
Then he nodded courteously to me and walked off to perform his unpleasant duty.
"Boy," she said courteously, "why are you crying?"
He always courteously obliged them, though by the end his thin, scratchy voice came out in gasps.
The phone is answered promptly and courteously by a virtual assistant working from her home in Manchester, England.
